class.name: PlayFabLobbySearchConfig
class.description: Passed to [method PlayFabMultiplayer.find_lobbies_async]. Searchable lobby properties must use PlayFab's service-owned [code]string_key1[/code]...[code]string_keyN[/code] and [code]number_key1[/code]...[code]number_keyN[/code] names. Typical query strings look like [code]string_key1 eq "duos"[/code] for [member filter] and [code]number_key1 desc[/code] for [member order_by].

members.member: PlayFab lobby search filter string, for example [code]string_key1 eq "duos"[/code] or [code]number_key1 ge 1000[/code].
PlayFab lobby search sort string, for example [code]number_key1 desc[/code].
